articles.title: 'We know glitter is not for everyone': Spotify says its confusing disco ball icon will be going back to normal soon
articles.description: Spotify has confirmed that its glittery disco ball on iOS is only a temporary change, lasting a few days.
articles.content:
• Spotify's glitter ball icon change on iOS is only temporary
  • The old icon will be coming back in the next few days
  • Many users hadn't been happy with the new look of the icon
